artifact_schema.set: strictly increasing array of exactly 11 positive integers

1.acceptance: all 2048 subset sums are distinct and the largest element is below 594

artifact_schema.edges: array of distinct six-element integer arrays

21.acceptance: pairwise intersecting, no hitting set of size at most five, and fewer than 18 edges

artifact_schema.coloring: zero/one array coloring positions 1 through N

138.acceptance: no monochromatic k-term arithmetic progression and N exceeds the frozen witness length

552.acceptance: C4-free graph of minimum degree at least five on 22 vertices
